key.name: enabled-monitors
key.description: List of monitor indices that should run a renderer. Empty means all monitors.

key.name: preset-rotation-interval
key.description: Seconds between automatic preset changes. Zero keeps manual rotation only.

key.name: blend-time
key.description: Seconds used to blend between presets.

key.name: beat-cuts-enabled
key.description: Allow beat events to force preset changes once implemented.

key.name: show-on-empty-desktop-only
key.description: Restrict the renderer to empty-desktop situations once the visibility policy is implemented.

key.name: hide-when-maximized
key.description: Hide or pause the renderer when windows are maximized.

key.name: preset-directory
key.description: Optional directory containing user-managed preset files.

key.name: fps-limit
key.description: Target frame rate limit used by the renderer.

key.name: audio-source
key.description: Output monitor source name or auto for automatic output-monitor selection (no microphone fallback).

key.name: eval-backend
key.description: Evaluator backend mode for per-frame expression execution.

key.name: debug-renderer
key.description: Enable verbose renderer logging while developing.

key.name: strict-render-path
key.description: Disable legacy Base64 frame fallback and require shared-memory frame transport.
